titleStmt.title: SII 25.22: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 22. (A.R. No. 22 of 1908.) DĀRĀŚURAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Inner gōpura of the Airāvatēśvara temple, right of entrance.
The details of the date of the record viz., Śaka 1408, the cyclic year Krōdhana, Makara-saṅkramaṇa which details are not sufficient for verification.

It records the grant of land in Śividapaṟṟu at Rājarājaśuram (i.e., Rājarājēśvaram) to meet the expenses of worship of the deity Rājarājēśuram-uḍaiya-nā[yaṉā]r also called Tambirāṉār by Ayyaṉ Vīramaraśar.
This chief may be identified with his namesake who figures as a subordinate of the Vijayanagara king Virūpāksha III, who ruled between 1465 and 1486 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śakābdam 1408 ṉmel cellā niṉṟa kuṟotanaRead kuroti sa
mvaṟsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu samkramapuṇyakālattu ṉāyanār IrājarājeThis word is expressed by symbols.curamuṭaiya nāyaṉā
ṟku pūcaikku Ayyaṉ viramācar taṉmamāka rājarājeThis word is expressed by symbols. curattil civita paṟṟil taṭi pala
viṉāl cetta nañcey rūpāy1 � Inta nilam Oṉṟe muṉṟu
māvum Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻaraiyum tampirāṉār pūcaikku
ṭalāka cantirātittavaraiyum naṭappatākavum Aricilāṟṟukku vaṭakku
Iḷaiya vaiṉātikku tep paṭutta paṟṟu nilakkaṭamai mā
ṇaṭarttu miṉāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭa koyilile kaṇṭu koṇṭu pūcai naṭattavum .
Digital edition of SII 25.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
